diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -3,7 +3,7 @@
 import esm

 

 class AAVPredictor(nn.Module):

-    def __init__(self, esm_model_name="esm2_t12_35M_UR50D", unfreeze_layers=2):

+    def __init__(self, esm_model_name="esm2_t12_35M_UR50D", unfreeze_layers=3):

         super().__init__()

         if esm_model_name == "esm2_t6_8M_UR50D":

             self.esm, self.alphabet = esm.pretrained.esm2_t6_8M_UR50D()

@@ -26,19 +26,22 @@
                 param.requires_grad = True

                 

         self.conv = nn.Sequential(

-            nn.Conv1d(in_channels=embed_dim, out_channels=256, kernel_size=5, padding=2),

+            nn.Conv1d(in_channels=embed_dim, out_channels=256, kernel_size=7, padding=3),

             nn.ReLU(),

             nn.Dropout(0.1),

-            nn.Conv1d(in_channels=256, out_channels=256, kernel_size=5, padding=2),

+            nn.Conv1d(in_channels=256, out_channels=256, kernel_size=7, padding=3),

+            nn.ReLU(),

+            nn.Dropout(0.1),

+            nn.Conv1d(in_channels=256, out_channels=256, kernel_size=7, padding=3),

             nn.ReLU(),

             nn.Dropout(0.1)

         )

         

         self.regressor = nn.Sequential(

-            nn.Linear(256, 128),

+            nn.Linear(512, 256),

             nn.ReLU(),

             nn.Dropout(0.2),

-            nn.Linear(128, 1)

+            nn.Linear(256, 1)

         )

         

     def forward(self, tokens):

@@ -53,9 +56,16 @@
         x = self.conv(x)

         x = x.transpose(1, 2) # (batch, seq_len, 256)

         

+        # Mean pooling

         sum_embeddings = torch.sum(x * mask.unsqueeze(-1), dim=1)

         lengths = mask.sum(dim=1, keepdim=True)

         lengths = torch.clamp(lengths, min=1e-9)

-        pooled_embeddings = sum_embeddings / lengths

+        mean_embeddings = sum_embeddings / lengths

+        

+        # Max pooling

+        x_masked = x.masked_fill(mask.unsqueeze(-1) == 0, -1e4)

+        max_embeddings, _ = torch.max(x_masked, dim=1)

+        

+        pooled_embeddings = torch.cat([mean_embeddings, max_embeddings], dim=-1)

         

         return self.regressor(pooled_embeddings).squeeze(-1)

--- a/predict.py
+++ b/predict.py
@@ -30,7 +30,7 @@
     

     device = torch.device("cuda" if torch.cuda.is_available() else "cpu")

     

-    model = AAVPredictor("esm2_t12_35M_UR50D", unfreeze_layers=2)

+    model = AAVPredictor("esm2_t12_35M_UR50D", unfreeze_layers=3)

     model.load_state_dict(torch.load(args.checkpoint, map_location="cpu"))

     model.to(device)

     model.eval()

--- a/train.py
+++ b/train.py
@@ -37,7 +37,7 @@
     

     device = torch.device("cuda" if torch.cuda.is_available() else "cpu")

     

-    model = AAVPredictor("esm2_t12_35M_UR50D", unfreeze_layers=2)

+    model = AAVPredictor("esm2_t12_35M_UR50D", unfreeze_layers=3)

     model.to(device)

     

     train_dataset = AAVDataset(train_csv, model.alphabet)

@@ -70,7 +70,7 @@
         {'params': conv_params + regressor_params, 'lr': 1e-3}

     ], weight_decay=1e-2)

     

-    epochs = 6

+    epochs = 8

     scheduler = torch.optim.lr_scheduler.CosineAnnealingLR(optimizer, T_max=epochs * len(train_loader))

     criterion = nn.MSELoss()

     scaler = torch.cuda.amp.GradScaler()
